title: Hide from users command options that we don't want them to use.
body:
We really want users to use the registries.conf file specified by
the administrator.  We also don't want them overriding the signature-policy.
Thes options are mainly their for CI/CD Systems, so they should be hidden
from the user.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM (as they're still usable but hidden). I prefer @TomSweeneyRedHat to ack before merging.

:pushpin: Commit f3853d7 has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`
